justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as Wednesday, May 27th, and then correctly understood the user's subsequent requests for Thursday, May 28th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered reasonable alternatives when the initial request was unavailable, although it could have offered a slightly wider range of options in the first turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent generally maintained efficiency, but the slight back-and-forth about Wednesday morning could have been streamlined if more options were presented initially.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with only a minor friction point due to the repeated unavailability on Wednesday morning.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by maintaining context and expanding the search to Thursday morning after Wednesday morning proved unavailable, though it required a user prompt to check Thursday specifically.
